title.en: The base of the Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

content.en:
The base of the Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

At this time, Migu Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor, Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, as well as the Eternal Dao Ancestor and Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain, also came here to discuss the attack with the three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"This operation is a failure, I didn't expect the Forbidden Zerg to hide the three-headed lord-level Forbidden Zerg!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord sighed.

Eternal Dao Ancestor spoke: "At present, the Forbidden Zerg has a nine-headed lord-level Forbidden Zerg, which is equivalent to nine half-step domain ancestors, and this is not necessarily all lord-level, what if there is a lord-level town guarding the inside of the Forbidden Zerg's lair?"

If it was before, the Eternal Dao Ancestor said this, and the other Dao Ancestors probably didn't care.

They felt that if there were really lord-level forbidden zergs, the last time they killed the taboo zerg's lair, all the lord-level forbidden zergs should come out.

But now, they felt that there was some truth in the words of the Eternal Dao Ancestor.

The nine-headed lord-level forbidden zerg is not necessarily all, maybe there is a tenth taboo zerg, or even an eleventh lord-level forbidden zerg.

Shenxu Dao Ancestor suddenly spoke: "We must be prepared, this time many of our Dao Ancestor's corpses have been plundered by the Forbidden Zerg, maybe they can use these corpses to cultivate a few more lord-level Forbidden Zerg." Moreover, we must also be mentally prepared, that is, the birth of the worm king!"

"The Insect King is comparable to the Domain Ancestor, where is it so easy to be born?"

Migu Daozu hurriedly retorted.

The Qinglong Palace Lord took a deep look at the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor and the Eternal Dao Ancestor, and said, "Eternal Dao Ancestor, Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, do you know some information?"

Eternal Dao Ancestor said: "I do know a little bit of the situation, but I am afraid to say it, you don't believe it!"

"Say, I believe!"

The main road of the Qinglong Palace.

"Then I'll say it!" the Eternal Dao Ancestor said, "According to the secrets of our Black Wind Mountain, there should be a Forbidden Insect Tree inside the Forbidden Zerg Lair, and there will be countless insect cocoons on the Insect Tree, as long as there is energy, these insect cocoons will give birth to the Forbidden Zerg one by one. According to the current scale of the Forbidden Zerg, there are at least a few lord-level forbidden Zerg cocoons on that Forbidden Bug Tree, as well as a Worm King-level Forbidden Zerg Cocoon! As for when that Bug King-level Bug Cocoon was born, I don't know. "

"If the information is true, can you enter the inside of the Forbidden Zerg Lair and destroy the Worm Tree and the Worm King Grade Worm Cocoon!" the Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor proposed.

"No!" Eternal Dao Ancestor shook his head, "Not to mention whether we can destroy the insect tree, the Forbidden Zerg's nest has a lot of pressure on us, I'm afraid we can't exert a few percent of our strength, and there is the old nest of the Forbidden Zerg, once the lord-level Forbidden Zerg fights with us, I'm afraid we will fall and die, and we don't even have any hope of escaping!

Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor closed his mouth and didn't dare to speak.

He didn't want to die, so he naturally didn't dare to enter the inside of the forbidden zerg lair.

"What should we do next?With the power that our major forces have invested in the Dark Forbidden Domain, it is not enough to destroy the Forbidden Zerg, if we let them accumulate urgently, we will destroy our base one day! Besides, we can't keep guarding here all the time, those Dao Ancestors also need to go back to cultivate, otherwise it will be difficult to improve their strength!" said the Qinglong Palace Lord worriedly.

"I have a proposal!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestral Road.

The other half-step domain ancestors looked at the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestors.

Shenxu Dao continued: "The reason why Dao Ancestors frequently return to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm now is nothing more than to sacrifice the Forbidden Zerg, so as to obtain the Xuanxu Ancient Realm's origin rewards and cultivation increases. But if we openly collect the corpses of the Forbidden Zerg and give cultivation resources and benefits according to the value of each Forbidden Zerg, then the Dao Ancestors will not leave the base, they can completely cultivate in the base, and they can go to fight against the Forbidden Zerg at any time, and they don't need to return to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!"

"That's a solution!"

Several half-step domain ancestors agreed.

However, this method can only ensure that the Dao Ancestor of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm has sufficient combat power, and it does not mean that the forbidden Zerg can be destroyed.

The eight half-step domain ancestors were discussing how to destroy the forbidden zerg, and they didn't come up with a decision after discussing for a long time.

Eventually, they ended the meeting and continued to fight as they were.

After the meeting.

Migu Dao Ancestor, Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor, and Zhenyu Dao Ancestor left the base of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, but they did not separate, but chatted in the Dark Forbidden Void.

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor took the lead in expressing his dissatisfaction: "There are definitely other half-step domain ancestors hidden in the Heavenly Emperor Palace and Black Wind Mountain, if all of their half-step domain ancestors are sent out, we can easily win this battle!"

"How is it possible that you let the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain go all out?"

Migu Daozu sneered: "The Heavenly Emperor Palace is not necessarily in a hurry to solve the Forbidden Zerg, they may also be ready to use the Forbidden Zerg as a basis for the rapid birth of the Forbidden Realm. Only when a steady stream of forbidden zergs are sacrificed can the Xuanxu Ancient Realm grow rapidly. If the Forbidden Zerg is killed at one time, it may not be able to give birth to the Forbidden World, and cutting leeks in waves like this is undoubtedly the best way. The purpose of Black Wind Mountain is not pure, they also want the Forbidden Realm to be born, and at the same time, there are also Dao Ancestors who use the Forbidden Zerg to exercise Black Wind Mountain. Although many Dao Ancestors will die, they can also cultivate many strong people. In short, neither of these forces really wants to destroy the Forbidden Zerg!"

"But our strength is too weak, and we can't solve the Forbidden Zerg, otherwise we will definitely destroy the Forbidden Zerg at all costs!"

Heavenly Brahma Dao Ancestor said with emotion.

The three of them chatted for a while, and then went their separate ways.

Migu Dao Ancestor watched the Heavenly Fan Dao Ancestor and the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor leave, and couldn't help but sneer secretly: "It's also two old foxes!"

......

Due to the heavy losses of the Forbidden Zerg this time and the plundering of many Dao Ancestor corpses, they also need time to rest and cultivate more Forbidden Zerg, so during this period of time, they will not come to attack the major bases in the Dao Mountain Realm.

At this time, the major bases also announced that they could exchange the corpses of the Forbidden Zerg for cultivation resources, and many Dao Ancestors only killed one Forbidden Zerg, and they were too lazy to return to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, so they chose to exchange cultivation resources one by one.

Moreover, the major bases have refined the dark forbidden power of the Dark Forbidden Domain into a gentle dark forbidden power and poured it into the bases, transforming each base into the most suitable cultivation holy land, so many Dao Ancestors are also willing to practice here.

Ye Tian returned to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, after all, he had obtained a lot of forbidden Zerg corpses this time, and once he sacrificed them all, he might be able to raise them to the true limit level of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in one fell swoop.

Other than that.

He already had a deep understanding of the Forbidden Dao Technique, and this time there was hope that he would realize a true Forbidden Dao Technique.
